name: Discord Ape Room Agent
description: Discord room template with slash commands for paid signals, watchlists, copy links, PnL panels, receipts, and user-confirmed intents.
degenPitch: Discord room becomes the casino floor, DNA x402 stays the cash register.
whatItDoes: Gates premium signals and room access with receipts.
Requires wallet/client signature for live movement.
cursorPrompt: Build a Discord Ape Room Agent with DNA x402. Add slash commands for paid signals, copy links, PnL panels, receipts, and user-confirmed intents. Keep wallet keys client-side and never backend sign.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Discord Ape Room Agent with DNA x402. Add slash commands for paid signals, copy links, PnL panels, receipts, and user-confirmed intents. Keep wallet keys client-side and never backend sign.
exampleFlow: Optional intent waits for wallet signature
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt binds copy room fee waterfall.
Bot never signs on behalf of users.
